title: The Last Lion: Winston Spencer Churchill
author: William Manchester
content: “History is a set of lies agreed upon.”
action: Verify all official narratives against raw, primary source data.

title: The Guns of August
author: Barbara Tuchman
content: “The war was made by the people who were convinced that it was going to be a short war.”
action: Avoid catastrophic miscalculations by rigorously accounting for long-term logistical variables.

title: A Bright Shining Lie
author: Neil Sheehan
content: “The war was a failure of the American intelligence system... a failure of perception, and a failure of the ability to adapt to a reality that didn't match the model.”
action: Prioritize external environmental feedback over internal dogma to prevent systemic failure.

title: The Power Broker
author: Robert Caro
content: “Power doesn't always corrupt. Power always reveals.”
action: Use authority as a diagnostic tool to expose the true character of an individual.

title: Bloodlands: Europe Between Hitler and Stalin
author: Timothy Snyder
content: “The state is not a protector, but a mechanism of distribution for the living and the dead.”
action: Acknowledge the state's capacity to treat human populations as mere arithmetic variables.
